title: Bartholomew
body:
**Bartholomew is a resource pack that replaces a large portion of Minecraft's textures with an image of Bart Simpson from [*The Simpsons*](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Simpsons).** If you've always considered Bart to be your world, then this resource pack is for you!

## Installation

1. Download and unzip the recource pack.
2. Move the pack into the game's **resourcepacks** folder
3. Open Minecraft, go to **Options > Resource Packs**, and select "Bartholomew".
4. Press **Done**.

## Notes

- There are no plans to port the resource pack to older versions of the game.
